resources.string: Complete two quick steps to start\nprotecting your apps instantly.
Allows App Lock to detect which app is in the foreground and display the lock screen when required.
Grants App Lock permission to enforce screen lock policies and prevent unauthorised deactivation.
Your data never leaves your device.\nNo account or internet connection required.
App Lock uses the Accessibility Service to monitor foreground apps and display the lock screen for protected applications. No personal data is collected or transmitted.
